info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API specification for the Ecommerce Build Time service, which handles product catalog, user management, orders, and payment processing.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product catalog including listing, creation, updating, and deletion of products.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User management operations including registration, authentication, and profile management.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Order processing operations such as creating, updating, and tracking customer orders.

tags.name: payments
tags.description: Payment handling operations including payment processing, refunds, and transaction history.

post.description: Register a new user by providing necessary user details. On success, returns the newly created user's information. The request body must include the user data as per the user_request schema.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid user registration data

example.message: User data provided is invalid or incomplete
A user with the given email or username already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place an order for a user
post.description: Submit a new order on behalf of a user identified by userId. Returns the created order response on success.

example.message: Order data provided is invalid or incomplete

details.issue: Order must contain at least one item

example.message: The specified user does not exist
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Fetch the order details using the given orderId. Returns detailed information about the order if it exists.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid order ID format

example.message: Provided orderId is malformed or invalid
The specified order does not exist

details.issue: No order matches the provided identifier

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's cart
post.description: Add a new item to the specified user's cart. The requestBody must contain the details of the item to add, conforming to the cart_item schema. Returns the updated cart in the response.

requestBody.description: Details of the cart item to add

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid cart item data

example.message: Cart item data is invalid or incomplete

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Fetch the current contents of the specified user's cart. Returns detailed cart information including items and quantities.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid user ID format

example.message: Provided userId is malformed or invalid
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track the shipping status of an order
get.description: Retrieves the current tracking status and details for the specified order identifier. Returns shipping updates to help users monitor their delivery progress.

404.description: Order not found or tracking information unavailable

example.message: The order with the specified ID was not found.

details.issue: No order exists with this identifier

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to inventory
post.description: Creates a new product in the catalog with the provided product details. Validates input and returns the created product record upon success.

requestBody.description: Product data to create a new product entry

example.name: Wireless Ergonomic Mouse
example.description: A wireless mouse designed for comfort and precision

example.message: One or more product fields are invalid or missing.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the provided SKU already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Receive and process payment notification webhook
post.description: Endpoint to receive asynchronous payment webhook notifications. Accepts data about payment status updates and processes them accordingly.

requestBody.description: Webhook payload containing payment update information

example.message: The webhook payload is missing required fields or is malformed.
The payment transaction failed or was declined.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Submits payment details to initiate a payment process. Returns confirmation and status of the payment initiation.

requestBody.description: Payment details needed to start the transaction

example.message: Payment request contains invalid data or missing fields.

details.issue: Amount must be a positive number

402.description: Payment required - transaction failed or declined

example.message: The payment has been declined or failed for the provided details.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway

totalAmount.description: Total amount for the order before discounts

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on the order

currency.description: Currency code for the order amounts

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order

items.description: List of items included in the order

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status for the order

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

userType.description: Type or role of the user

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user information was last updated

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Number of items available in stock

quantity.description: The number of units ordered for the product

price.description: Original price per unit of the product

discount.description: Discount applied to the product price per unit

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount

quantity.description: The number of units of the product in the cart

price.description: Original price per unit of the product

discount.description: Discount applied to the product price per unit

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after applying discount

currency.description: Currency code for the price (ISO 4217 format)

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the tracking information was last updated

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the delivery

status.description: Current delivery status of the order

trackingId.description: Tracking identifier assigned by the courier

totalAmount.description: Total amount before discounts for all items in the cart

totalDiscount.description: Sum of discounts applied to all cart items

currency.description: Currency code for all prices in the response (ISO 4217 format)

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning the cart

items.description: List of items currently in the user's cart

payableAmount.description: Total amount payable after applying discounts

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated

amount.description: The total amount to be paid

paymentMethod.description: Method used for payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal)

preferredCurrency.description: User's preferred currency code in ISO 4217 format

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

userType.description: Type or role of the user within the system

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the payment was created

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used for the transaction

currency.description: Currency code in which the payment was made

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier from the payment gateway

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the product was created

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI settings

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Number of items available in stock

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the product information was last updated

path.description: Request path that caused the error
